description: Run the T4 + Kimina-Lean-Server loop end-to-end: zero-shot generate with un-SFT'd Qwen2.5-0.5B on a 50-problem miniF2F_v2s/test subset (seed 0) and verify, measuring pass@1 and wall-clock.
motivation: Establish the infrastructure gate and the no-SFT baseline floor.
formal_results: Qwen2.5-0.5B zero-shot: 0/50 pass@1; gen 333s + verify 3010s ~ 55.7 min on one T4 + Kimina v2.0.0. Completions show degenerate repetition (a clean floor).
results_description: The loop runs end-to-end on free tier; the pre-SFT floor is 0/50.
conclusions: Infrastructure gate passed; baseline floor is 0/50 pass@1 - any SFT/granularity gain must beat zero.
